fields.System.Title: Admin-Managed Document Library for Hoops App
fields.System.Description: Enable administrative users to upload, manage, and categorize PDF documents displayed in the Hoops app. Documents will be stored in Azure Blob Storage, and metadata (including menu category, section, and blob path) will be stored in Azure Table Storage. The public-facing app will dynamically load documents without requiring code deployments.

fields.System.Title: Define Table Storage Schema for Document Metadata
fields.System.Description: Create a structured Azure Table Storage schema to store metadata for documents displayed in the Hoops app.
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria:
- Table named 'MenuDocuments' exists
- Columns include PartitionKey, RowKey, Title, BlobPath, BlobUrl, SortOrder, Description, IsActive, Season, LastUpdatedUtc, Section
- Schema documented for frontend and backend teams

fields.System.Title: Create Azure Table Storage table 'MenuDocuments'
fields.System.Description: Provision the table inside the existing Azure Storage Account.

fields.System.Title: Document schema definition and naming conventions
fields.System.Description: Document PartitionKey, RowKey, and all metadata fields including the new Section field.

fields.System.Title: Create sample metadata rows for testing
fields.System.Description: Insert sample rows into the table for UI and API validation.

fields.System.Title: Implement Azure Function for PDF Upload and Metadata Write
fields.System.Description: Create an Azure Function that allows admins to upload PDFs and automatically writes metadata to Table Storage.
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria:
- Admin can upload PDF
- File stored in Blob Storage
- Metadata row created in Table Storage including Section
- API returns success/failure
- Validation errors returned cleanly

fields.System.Title: Create Azure Function endpoint for PDF upload
Implement Blob Storage upload logic
fields.System.Description: Upload PDF to Blob Storage and generate BlobPath and BlobUrl.

fields.System.Title: Write metadata row to Table Storage
fields.System.Description: Insert metadata including Section, Title, Category, SortOrder, and BlobPath.

fields.System.Title: Build Angular Admin UI for Document Upload and Management
fields.System.Description: Create an admin UI page that allows uploading PDFs and entering metadata.
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria:
- Admin UI exists under /admin/documents
- Form includes Title, Category, Section, Season, SortOrder, File
- Calls upload API
- Shows success/error messages

fields.System.Title: Create Angular route and upload form
fields.System.Description: Add /admin/documents route and build upload form UI.

fields.System.Title: Add dropdowns for Category and Section
fields.System.Description: Populate dropdowns from static config or API.

fields.System.Title: Integrate form with upload API
fields.System.Description: Call Azure Function and handle responses.

fields.System.Title: Update Public App to Load Documents Dynamically
fields.System.Description: Modify the public-facing Hoops app to load documents dynamically from Table Storage metadata.
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria:
- API returns documents filtered by category and section
- Angular loads metadata dynamically
- Documents open via BlobUrl
- Inactive documents hidden

fields.System.Title: Create public API to query documents
fields.System.Description: Implement GET /documents?category=&section= using Table Storage queries.

fields.System.Title: Update Angular menu to load metadata dynamically
fields.System.Description: Replace static menu items with API-driven document lists.
